name: feature-card-gutenberg-dev
description: WordPress Feature Cards - Plugin and Theme Development Environment

scripts.build: npm run build:plugin && npm run build:theme
scripts.start: npm run start:plugin & npm run start:theme
scripts.env:restart: npm run env:stop && npm run env:start
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd feature-cards && npm install && cd ../feature-cards-theme && npm install
